hook.text: OUR ARSENAL WIN IS MATCH OF THE SEASON

beats.text: ARSENAL 2-3 UNITED WINS THE PL FAN VOTE
THAT COMEBACK IN NORTH LONDON BEATS EVERY GAME
THE PREMIER LEAGUE FANS MADE THE RIGHT CALL

caption: Arsenal 2-3 Manchester United has been officially voted the best Premier League match of the 2025/26 season! That comeback in North London will live forever in the memory. What was your favourite moment from that night? 🔴
